name: Orzo Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 8 oz uncooked orzo pasta (or other small pasta)
1 small zucchini, quartered lengthwise and sliced thinly
1 cup diced eggplant (peel first if desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the orzo according to package directions.
2. Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a medium saucepan.
3. Add the vegetables to the boiling broth and sauté until done to your liking (5-10 minutes).
4. Drain the cooked orzo and add it to the vegetables.
5. Continue cooking until it reaches your desired temperature.
6. Optionally, top with some low-fat cheese if desired.
